description_long: This is a wooden bed frame with a robust, rectangular structure and a slatted base designed to support a mattress. The headboard is tall and features vertical slats in its upper section, adding a decorative and supportive element. The footboard is lower and solid, matching the overall sturdy aesthetic of the frame. The wood has a medium brown finish with a matte texture, giving it a natural and slightly rustic appearance. The bed frame sits on four thick, square legs, providing stability and a sense of durability. There is no mattress or bedding present, leaving the slatted support surface fully exposed.
description: A sturdy wooden bed frame with a tall slatted headboard, solid footboard, and exposed slatted base in a medium brown finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the tall slatted headboard, and the solid footboard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the slatted headboard and the open slatted base, with both side rails and legs visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the headboard, footboard, and slatted base from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard, displaying its solid lower section and slatted upper section.
